refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall (1) derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, (2) record these performance requirements with traceability to inputs, and (3) manage updates and history of performance baselines and calibrations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and combines multiple functions: derivation, recording, and management of performance requirements. Decomposing clarifies verification and design focus.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify derivation by comparing generated requirements to mission inputs; verify recording by audit of stored data; verify management by checking update history and traceability.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage updates and history of performance baselines and calibrations

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using mission input models
Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history
Version control and update management system for baselines/calibrations
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, database storage, and update management to fulfill all sub-FRs cohesively

potential_sources: Strong coupling between derivation and recording due to data flow
Update management depends on recorded data integrity
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups tightly coupled functions to minimize interface complexity and maintain traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation logic
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management if complexity grows to reduce diffusion risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other NGHE subsystems

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management with remote systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this functionality is core to NGHE software; low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation.
Vehicle module is primarily physical and control-focused; poor containment and high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control; unrelated to performance requirement derivation.
Safety Services may consume performance data but is not responsible for derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes interface complexity and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module if functionality grows too large
Dependency on accurate and timely telemetry data input
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting update management if complexity or diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical cohesion and traceability.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized DP implementation in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data audits, database record inspections, and update history reviews within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of all sub-FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing update management if complexity grows
Ensure robust telemetry data validation to mitigate input risks

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the update management sub-FR may require further modularization to reduce potential diffusion risk as complexity grows.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage updates and history of performance baselines and calibrations

revise.why: To explore modularization of update management and refine coupling and diffusion risks.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can support integrated software functions
open_risks: Data inconsistency risk in update management
Potential module overload if functionality grows
evidence_needed: Performance of integrated DP in prototype or simulation
